nasb.text: Therefore they called these days Purim after the name of Pur. And because of the instructions in this letter, both what they had seen in this regard and what had happened to them,

esv.text: Therefore they called these days Purim, after the term Pur. Therefore, because of all that was written in this letter, and of what they had faced in this matter, and of what had happened to them,

cnv.text: 因此，猶大人照著“普珥”的名字，稱這兩日為普珥節；所以他們因這信上的話，又因他們所看見和所遭遇的事，

ccb.text: 他们借用普珥这个词，称这两天为普珥节。犹太人因这信上的一切话，又因所看见、所经历的事，
